modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error opening Word documents due to work file issue

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to open some Word docs. But then they got this error saying Word couldn't create the work file. They mentioned checking the temp environment variable, whatever that means. It's kinda frustrating when you just wanna get your work done, right?
short_description: Error opening Word documents due to work file issue
description: So, the user was trying to open some Word docs. But then they got this error saying Word couldn't create the work file. They mentioned checking the temp environment variable, whatever that means. It's kinda frustrating when you just wanna get your work done, right?
